name: Meningococcal Vaccine Codes
description: CVX and CPT codes for meningococcal vaccines including MenACWY (conjugate) and MenB (serogroup B). Used in adolescent immunization (IMA) measures. MenACWY requires 1 dose at 11-12 years with a booster at 16.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Meningococcal polysaccharide (groups A, C, Y, W-135) diphtheria toxoid conjugate vaccine (MenACWY-D, Menactra)
Meningococcal oligosaccharide (groups A, C, Y, W-135) CRM197 conjugate vaccine (MenACWY-CRM, Menveo)
Meningococcal polysaccharide (groups A, C, Y, W-135) TT conjugate vaccine (MenACWY-TT, MenQuadfi)
Meningococcal vaccine of unknown formulation and target serogroup
Meningococcal polysaccharide (groups A, C, Y, W-135) TT conjugate vaccine (Penbraya)
Meningococcal conjugate vaccine, serogroups A, C, Y and W-135 (MenACWY or MCV4)
Meningococcal conjugate vaccine, serogroups A, C, Y, W-135, MenACWY-TT
Meningococcal recombinant protein and outer membrane vesicle vaccine, serogroup B (MenB-4C, Bexsero)
Meningococcal recombinant lipoprotein vaccine, serogroup B (MenB-FHbp, Trumenba)
